title: Tighten a single-channel observable bound with explicit positivity kernels
summary: Recast a single-channel observable constraint into an optimization problem with explicit positivity kernels and typed normalization assumptions. Goal: produce a numerically reproducible bound stronger or qualitatively different from the seed baseline without coupled-channel machinery.

expected_artifacts.description: Step-by-step derivation of the bound and assumptions (NOT_FOR_CITATION).

verification_plan: Implement a deterministic script that (i) reproduces a baseline bound under identical assumptions and (ii) demonstrates a tightened bound when adding the new constraint. Save all inputs/outputs/plots with hashes.
risks: Constraint set may be too weak without additional external inputs; mitigate by proving a clean analytic inequality first.
Numerical optimization instability; mitigate with toy problems + regression tests.
